item.title: Download CalendarTask (formerly DesktopCal) 3.28.270.8519

You can double-click on a date to quickly add notes and also jump to specific dates in the past or future. item.title: Download BoostPing 1.6.7
item.description: BoostPing helps optimize your online gaming experience by modifying the network throttling index and disabling the Nagle algorithm. By turning this feature off, you can achieve more instantaneous data transfer speeds, potentially reducing latency. What is Nagle's algorithm? The Nagle algorithm is designed to improve network efficiency by combining small data packets into larger packets, which can cause lag in online games. Disabling it can result in more responsive gameplay. On the...

item.title: Download HFS: HTTP File Server (version 3) 3.0.6
item.description: HFS is a web file server to run on your computer. Share a folder or even a file thanks to the virtual file system. Essentially, this application turns your computer into an HTTP server and all users who want to connect and download files can do so by loading a simple website in their browser. HFS includes many configuration settings, so you can basically change each part of the application, starting with how users download files and ending with the appearance of the created website. HFS...

item.title: Download CCleaner – Phone Cleaner 26.03.0 build 800011385
item.description: CCleaner is a system cleaning and optimization tool for Android devices. CCleaner for Android allows users to delete unnecessary files, such as temporary files and caches, as well as identify and uninstall applications that are taking up too much space on the device. It also includes a task kill to close running applications and free up memory. This can help free up storage space and improve device performance. In addition, CCleaner for Android also has a security feature that allows you...
